'''√s-n-sh''' ('''kasanash''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:deanthropomorphize|deanthropomorphize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-n-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:deanthropomorphize|deanthropomorphize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √s-n-sh
|-
! Lemma
| kasanash
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thisanash || jisanash || shisanash || kisanash
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthusanash || jujusanash || shushusanash || kukusanash
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thusanash || jusanash || shusanash || kusanash
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thusanash || jusanash || shusanash || kusanash
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thesanash || jesanash || shesanash || kesanash
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothosanash || jojosanash || shoshosanash || kokosanash
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thosanash || josanash || shosanash || kosanash
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thosanash || josanash || shosanash || kosanash
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || sanash || sanash || sanash || sanash
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || sanash || sanash || sanash || sanash
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || sanash || sanash || sanash || sanash
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || sanash || sanash || sanash || sanash
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thæsanash || jæsanash || shæsanash || kæsanash
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathasanash || jajasanash || shashasanash || kakasanash
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thasanash || jasanash || shasanash || kasanash
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thasanash || jasanash || shasanash || kasanash
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shasanash
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshasanash
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishasanash
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shasanashnü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshasanashnknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishasanashnü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shasanashshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshasanashnkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishasanashshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shasanashro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshasanashnkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishasanashro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shasanashmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshasanashnkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishasanashmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shasanashsher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshasanashnksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishasanashsher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shasanashng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshasanashnkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishasanashng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shasanashya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshasanashnkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishasanashya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shasanashyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshasanashnkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishasanashyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shasanashnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshasanashnknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishasanashnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shasanashnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshasanashnknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishasanashnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shasanashnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshasanashnknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishasanashnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shasanashshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshasanashnkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishasanashshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shasanashshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshasanashnkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishasanashshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shasanashshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshasanashnkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishasanashshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shasanashronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshasanashnkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishasanashronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shasanashroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshasanashnkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishasanashroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shasanashromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshasanashnkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishasanashromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shasanashmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshasanashnkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishasanashmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shasanashmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshasanashnkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishasanashmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shasanashmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshasanashnkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishasanashmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d176386}}
